Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Fourth Cause Of Action Of Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-10-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Demurrer To Fourth Cause Of Action Of PlAINTIFF'S Complaint is sustained without leave to amend, no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
